1. ## **Outlet List** 

   enhance response eksisting   
* **API 			:** https://best.scyllax.online/scylla-pjp/api/v1/mobile/visits/outlet/list?salesman\_code=2025120202\&cust\_id=C220010001\&date=2026-01-08   
* **Add Response**		: 

  Add longitude dan latitude pada masing-masing data (dari tabel mst.m\_outlet)

* **Response Eksisting :** 

  {

   "code": 200,

   "status": "OK",

   "data": \[

     {

       "id": 1719,

       "year": 2026,

       "week": 2,

       "date": "2026-01-08T00:00:00Z",

2. ## **Validasi Geotaging** 

![][image1]  
 Create new endpoint :  
Content-Type 	: application/json  
Method		: POST  
URL		: {{url}}/scylla-pjp/api/v1/mobile/visits/geotaging

### **Headers**

---

| Accept | application/json |
| :---- | :---- |
| Authorization | Bearer Token eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..a0LeOmfzKXEhyPPc0UrDxZIyOJXYGxfcr49LaW7ksp4 |

### **Body** 

---

| Field | Type | Required | Note |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| emp\_id | int(8) | Yes | dari resp login  |
| user\_id | int(8) | Yes |  |
| cust\_id | int(8) | Yes |  |
| activity | varchar(50) | Yes | (arrive, leave) |
| current\_time | epoch  | Yes | epoch  diisi tanggal dan waktu saat hit  |
| outlet\_id | int(8) | Yes | FE sesuai outlet id yang dipilih  |
| outlet\_longitude | varchar(50) | Yes |  |
| outlet\_latitude | varchar(50) | Yes |  |
| arrival\_longitude | varchar(50) | Yes | FE kirim longitude sesuai current location BE compare dengan mst.m\_outlet.longitude |
| arrival\_latitude | varchar(50) | Yes | FE kirim latitude sesuai current location BEcompare dengan mst.m\_outlet.latitude |

### **Example Request** 

---

**Example Request Default**

|  |
| :---- |

### **Response** 

---

| Nama Atribut | Type  | Length | Description |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| message | String | 150 | Response Message |
| data | Array | \- |  \- |
| location\_status | int | 11 |  |
| distance\_meter | int | 11 |  |
| allowed\_radius | int | 1 | diambil dari mst.m\_salesman.sm\_radius  BE cek berdasarkan emp\_id dari request body  |
| request\_id | String | 150 | Generate request id  |

**Example Response :** 

| Case : melebihi radius 100m {  "message": "Arrival confirmed successfully",  "data": {    "location\_status": "FORCED\_OUT\_OF\_RADIUS",    "distance\_meter": 135,    "allowed\_radius": 100,   },  "request\_id": "6915a6dd2395083c685e8e16" }  |
| :---- |
| Case : in radius {  "message": "Arrival confirmed successfully",  "data": {    "location\_status": "IN\_RADIUS",    "distance\_meter": 135,    "allowed\_radius": 100,    "confirmed\_at": "2026-01-06T19:45:03+07:00"  },  "request\_id": "6915a6dd2395083c685e8e16" }  |
| Case : GPS disable ( arrival\_longitude / arrival\_latitude null) {  "message": "GPS is required to confirm arrival",  "data": null,  "error\_code": "GPS\_DISABLED",  "request\_id": "6915a6dd2395083c685e8e16" } |

3. ## Arrive

enhance :   
Content-Type 	: application/json  
Method		: POST  
URL		: **scylla-pjp**/api/v1/mobile/visits/arrive

### **Headers**

---

| Accept | application/json |
| :---- | :---- |
| Authorization | Bearer Token eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..a0LeOmfzKXEhyPPc0UrDxZIyOJXYGxfcr49LaW7ksp4 |

### **Body** 

---

| Field | Type | Required | Note |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| date | eksisting  |  |  |
| salesman\_code |  |  |  |
| cust\_id |  |  |  |
| current\_time |  |  |  |
| id |  |  |  |
| outlet\_id |  |  |  |
| longitude |  |  |  |
| latitude |  |  |  |
| is\_update\_location |  |  |  |
| file\_url |  |  |  |
| user\_id | int(8) | Yes | dari resp login |
| activity | varchar(50) | Yes | arrive |
| outlet\_id | int(8) | Yes | FE sesuai outlet id yang dipilih / diambil dr req geotaging   |
| outlet\_longitude | varchar(50) | Yes |  |
| outlet\_latitude | varchar(50) | Yes |  |
| location\_status | int | 11 | dari resp validasi geotaging  |
| distance\_meter | int | 11 |  |
| allowed\_radius | int | 1 |  |

### **Impact ke Database** 

* save ke table arrival\_report

| Nama Kolom | Tipe Data |
| :---- | :---- |
| cust\_id\*\* | diisi cust\_id user login |
| arrival\_id\* | generate BE |
| outlet\_id\* | dari req body FE : outlet\_id\* |
| user\_id\*\* | dari req body FE : user\_id\*\* |
| activity | dari req body FE : activity |
| arrival\_longitude | dari req body FE : longitude |
| arrival\_latitude | dari req body FE : latitude |
| outlet\_longitude | dari req body FE : outlet\_longitude |
| outlet\_latitude | dari req body FE : outlet\_latitude |
| distance\_meter | dari req body FE : distance\_meter |
| allowed\_radius | dari req body FE : allowed\_radius |
| location\_status | dari req body FE : location\_status |
| created\_by | diisi user yang melakukan aktivitas |
| created\_at | diisi saat user melakukan arrive  |
| updated\_by | NULL  |
| updated\_at | NULL |
| deleted\_by | NULL |
| deleted\_at | NULL |
| is\_del | NULL |

| mermaid  sequenceDiagram    autonumber    participant U as User    participant FE as Frontend (Mobile App)     participant LS as Local Storage (FE)    participant BE as Backend API    participant DB as Database      U-\>\>FE: Open Arrival Screen     alt Device online        FE-\>\>BE: POST /scylla-pjp/api/v1/mobile/visits/geotaging        BE-\>\>BE: Calculate distance & validate radius         alt User is within radius            BE--\>\>FE: within\_radius \= true\\nlocation\_status \= IN\_RADIUS            FE--\>\>U: Show "You are at outlet location"            U-\>\>FE: Tap "Confirm Arrival"            FE-\>\>BE: POST /scylla-pjp/api/v1/mobile/visits/arrive            BE-\>\>DB: Save arrival report (IN\_RADIUS)            DB--\>\>BE: OK            BE--\>\>FE: Success response            FE--\>\>U: Arrival confirmed         else User is outside radius            BE--\>\>FE: within\_radius \= false\\nlocation\_status \= OUT\_OF\_RADIUS            FE--\>\>U: Show warning "You are far from the outlet"            U-\>\>FE: Tap "Confirm Arrival"            FE-\>\>BE: POST /scylla-pjp/api/v1/mobile/visits/arrive\\n(force\_confirm \= true)            BE-\>\>BE: Recalculate distance\\nFinal validation            BE-\>\>DB: Save arrival report (FORCED\_OUT\_OF\_RADIUS)            DB--\>\>BE: OK            BE--\>\>FE: Success response            FE--\>\>U: Arrival confirmed        end     else Device offline        FE--\>\>U: Show offline info\\n"You're offline. Arrival will be synced later"        U-\>\>FE: Tap "Confirm Arrival (Offline)"        FE-\>\>LS: Save arrival payload locally\\n(outlet\_id, lat, lng, device\_time, force\_confirm)        FE--\>\>U: Arrival saved locally         Note over FE,LS: Data queued for sync    end     Note over FE,BE: Background sync when connection restored     FE-\>\>BE: POST /scylla-pjp/api/v1/mobile/visits/arrive\\n(from local queue)    BE-\>\>BE: Calculate distance & validate radius    BE-\>\>DB: Save arrival report\\n(location\_status based on distance)    DB--\>\>BE: OK    BE--\>\>FE: Success response    FE-\>\>LS: Remove synced data   |
| :---- |

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
